SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway

Class AppController

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.AppController
@RestController @CrossOrigin @RolesAllowed({"users","admin"}) @RequestMapping("/rest") @Lazy(false) public class AppController extends Object
Provides basic /rest API calls for application information.
Author:
Audacious Inquiry

  • Constructor Details

    • AppController

      public AppController(gov.cdc.izgateway.security.AccessControlRegistry registry)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      registry - The Access Control Registry

  • Method Details

    • getBuild

      @GetMapping({"/build","/build.txt"}) public String getBuild()
      Get the build information about the application.
      Returns:
      build information

    • getLogo

      @GetMapping("/logo") public String getLogo()
      Get the application logo (favicon).
      Returns:
      The application logo.

    • getIpAddress

      @GetMapping("/icanhazip") public gov.cdc.izgateway.logging.info.HostInfo getIpAddress(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
      Get the IP address and hostname of the caller.
      Parameters:
      req - the HTTP servlet request containing information about the caller
      Returns:
      the IP address and hostname of the caller as seen by the application

    • getHealth

      @GetMapping("/health") public gov.cdc.izgateway.logging.event.Health getHealth()
      Report the health of the application, returning 200 OK and the health status.
      Returns:
      The Health of the application.

    • getUtilization

      @GetMapping("/utilization") public gov.cdc.izgateway.utils.UtilizationService.Utilization getUtilization()
      Get application resource utilization.
      Returns:
      The resource utilization.

    • isHealthy

      @GetMapping("/healthy") public gov.cdc.izgateway.logging.event.Health isHealthy(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse resp)
      Report the health of the application, returning 200 OK if the application is health, or 503 Service unavailable if it is not.
      Parameters:
      resp - The response.
      Returns:
      The Health of the application.
